summary: Tested dealer flow fixes: Admin edit dealer phone/email, admin link dealer product to master SKU. Found and fixed bug in dealer products GET endpoint that was overwriting 'id' field with ObjectId string. All features now working correctly.

fixed_during_testing.issue: Was overwriting 'id' field with ObjectId string instead of preserving UUID
fixed_during_testing.fix: Modified to use existing 'id' field if present, fallback to ObjectId string

fixed_during_testing.issue: First endpoint at line 31523 didn't handle master_sku_id parameter
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added master_sku_id Form parameter and proper ObjectId handling

fixed_during_testing.issue: Duplicate endpoint at line 33577 causing confusion

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dealer flow features are working: 1) Admin can edit dealer phone/email via edit modal, 2) Admin can link dealer products to master SKUs, 3) Master SKU mapping displays correctly in products table. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_dealer_flow.py covers all CRUD operations.

features_verified.admin_edit_dealer_phone: PASS - Phone field editable in edit dealer modal with data-testid='edit-dealer-phone'
features_verified.admin_edit_dealer_email: PASS - Email field editable in edit dealer modal with data-testid='edit-dealer-email'
features_verified.admin_link_product_to_master_sku: PASS - Master SKU dropdown in edit product modal, updates persist correctly
features_verified.dealer_products_shows_master_sku: PASS - Master SKU column shows linked SKU code or 'Not mapped'
features_verified.edit_dealer_modal_email_field: PASS - Email field visible and functional
features_verified.edit_product_modal_master_sku_dropdown: PASS - Dropdown shows all master SKUs with correct values
